free_text: The experimental values of isomeric yield ratios were
calculated taking into account the contribution from
the beta-decay of isobaric nuclei in the yields of
Spectrometers based on Ge detectors (160 cm3,
resolution of 1.8 keV for 1330 keV 60Co gamma-line)
The half-lives are 25 min for g.s. and 30 hr for m.s.
